info.name: Filmpire API
info.description:
Complete API collection for testing all Filmpire microservices through the API Gateway, with request tracing.

Infrastructure Flow:
1. Request → API Gateway (localhost:8080)
2. Gateway → Eureka Service Discovery (localhost:8761)
3. Eureka → target service (movie-service:8081, user-service:8082, actor-service:8083)
4. Service → TMDB API (external) / PostgreSQL / MongoDB / Redis as needed
5. Response with caching where applicable

HATEOAS: single-resource GET endpoints (movie/actor details, user profile) advertise navigation via `_links`. Movie details return the HATEOAS resource bare (top-level `_links`); actor details and the user profile stay inside the shared ApiResponse envelope, so their links live under `data._links` instead.

Auth: run '8. User Service - Auth → Register' first (or 'Login' if you already have an account) to populate the access_token/refresh_token collection variables used by every '9. User Service - Profile & Lists' request.

item.name: 1. Health & Discovery

request.description: Check API Gateway health status
Check Movie Service health directly (bypassing gateway)
Check Actor Service health directly (bypassing gateway)
Check User Service health directly (bypassing gateway)
View Eureka dashboard to see registered services

item.description: Health checks and service discovery endpoints

request.description: Discover movies with pagination through API Gateway
Discover action movies (genreId=28)
Discover movies from 2024
Discover movies with rating >= 7.5
Search movies by title/keywords
Get detailed info for Fight Club (ID: 550). The detail resource is a bare HATEOAS payload (no ApiResponse envelope): self + videos/credits/similar/recommendations links.
Get detailed info for Inception (ID: 27205)
Get currently popular movies
Get highest-rated movies
Get trending movies for the week
Get trending movies for the day

item.name: 5. Movie Service - Extras

request.description: Get trailers and clips for Fight Club
Get cast and crew for Fight Club
Get movies similar to Fight Club
Get recommended movies based on Fight Club

item.description: Movie videos, credits, similar, and recommendations

request.description: Get all available movie genres

item.name: 7. Actor Service

request.description: Get detailed actor profile for Edward Norton (TMDB person ID: 819). Wrapped in the shared ApiResponse envelope; the detail resource under 'data' carries self + filmography (movies) HATEOAS links.
Get Edward Norton's filmography, newest release first
Search actors by name

item.description: Actor profiles, filmography and search (native typed API, issue #18)

item.name: 8. User Service - Auth

request.description: Create an account. Generates a random username/email via a pre-request script so this can be re-run without colliding with a previous run, then captures access_token/refresh_token for the rest of the collection.

exec: // Generate a fresh, collision-free username/email each run so Register
// can be replayed without a manual 409/400 cleanup step.

request.description: Log in with the credentials created by Register (test_username/test_password collection variables). Run Register at least once first.
Rotate the refresh token: mints a new access/refresh pair and invalidates the presented one.
Revoke the current refresh token. The access token stays valid until its natural expiry.

item.description: Registration, login, token refresh and logout (issue #17)

item.name: 9. User Service - Profile & Lists

request.description: Get the caller's profile. The resource under 'data' carries self + favorites/watchlist HATEOAS links.
Update the caller's email (the only mutable profile field; username is the JWT subject).
Change the caller's password.
List the caller's favorite movies, newest first.
Add Fight Club to favorites (idempotent).
Remove Fight Club from favorites (idempotent).
List the caller's watchlist, newest first.
Add Inception to the watchlist (idempotent).
Remove Inception from the watchlist (idempotent).

item.description: Profile, favorites and watchlist for the authenticated user (issue #17)

item.name: 10. Testing Rate Limiting

request.description: Send this request 25+ times rapidly to test rate limiting (10 req/sec, burst 20)

item.description: Test rate limiting and circuit breaker
